title: Apply for a new adult passport from the US - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply for a new adult passport from the US
Where are you right now? Canada | US | Outside Canada and the US

## Passport and travel document service fees have increased
As of March 31, 2026 , most fees for passports and travel document services have increased. Learn how these changes may affect your application .
A Canadian passport is a travel document that Canadian citizens can apply for.
If you already have an adult passport , you may be able to renew your adult passport. Renewing a passport is simpler than applying for a new one.
Find out if you should renew your passport instead of applying for a new one.
From [Error loading fee. Check the fee list .]
20 business days, plus mail time
